name: Baskets
notes: Selected by integer PK (Baskets.Id) via GetByIdAsync — no Specification, no Items eager load.
Deleted by DeleteAsync; EF Core cascade deletes all child BasketItems rows in the same operation.

name: BasketItems
notes: All BasketItems rows for the basket are deleted via EF Core cascade when the parent Basket row is deleted.
Not explicitly queried or iterated — the cascade is handled entirely by EF Core's change-tracking and foreign key configuration.
